prerequisite_concepts.definition: A model parameter or distribution-shape parameter named alpha in the local context.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 局部模型中记为 alpha 的参数或分布形状参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Probability
introduced_concepts.definition: A quantity measuring how likely an event or state transition is.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量某个事件或状态转移发生可能性的数量。

introduced_concepts.name: Lambda
introduced_concepts.definition: Lambda names the biological object or model condition being used in this formula.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Lambda 表示本式讨论的生物学对象或模型条件，读公式时先确认它对应哪一类群体、性状或过程。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 10.16b Mean
introduced_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Fitness Width
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scale parameter controlling how quickly fitness declines away from the optimum.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 控制性状偏离最优值时适合度下降速度的尺度参数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Lambdasimeq
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Lambdasimeq is the main quantity to read from this equation; the right-hand side shows which terms determine it.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Lambdasimeq 是这条公式要读出的核心量；等号右侧说明它由哪些条件和符号共同决定。

introduced_concepts.name: Silent-Site Mutation Rate
introduced_concepts.definition: The mutation rate assigned to silent sites.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 沉默位点对应的突变率。

introduced_concepts.name: Probability
introduced_concepts.definition: A quantity measuring how likely an event or state transition is.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量某个事件或状态转移发生可能性的数量。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 10.25a Function
introduced_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

introduced_concepts.name: K Sub a
introduced_concepts.definition: Hence (10.25a) so that very strong, or frequent, selection is required for.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: K Sub a 表示本式讨论的生物学对象或模型条件，读公式时先确认它对应哪一类群体、性状或过程。

introduced_concepts.name: Population Size
introduced_concepts.definition: The number of individuals or gene copies represented by the population model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中表示的个体数或基因拷贝数。

introduced_concepts.name: Selection Coefficient
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter measuring the strength of selection.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量选择强度的参数。
